title: Mimetes zeyheri

The plant is classified as a shrub or small tree, with a height range of up to 5 meters. Mimetes zeyheri is closely related to other species in the genus Mimetes, which are characterized by their unique, often brightly colored flowers. The exact classification of Mimetes zeyheri is still subject to some debate among botanists.
